CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $700.00 FILED BY PETTUS LOUIS V. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ROYAL MOTORS SALES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROYAL MOTORS SALES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETTUS LOUIS V. $429.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $429.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ROYAL MOTORS SALES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
